TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-flood_waon a boong
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kakhayza'an tatini' pa'alowa' ka minayhael.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan tatiniʔ paʔalowaʔ ka minajhæl.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an tatini' pa'alowa' ka minayhael.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan tatiniʔ paʔalowaʔ ka minajhæl.
S.TRANSL: 從前,祖先告訴他們的子女,
Once upon a time, our ancestors told their descendants ...

S.FORM: mita' oemaeh ray horok.
S.PHON: mitaʔ œmæh raj horok.
S.FORM: mita' oemaeh ray horok.
S.PHON: mitaʔ œmæh raj horok.
S.TRANSL: 我們山上的地,
In our flatland in the mountain,

S.FORM: mwai' ila 'aehae' mae'iyaeh rima' mayakai' ka(no) 'ima haebaean koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ila ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh rimaʔ majakaiʔ ka(no) ʔima hæβæan koʃa pas~θkajz~ðæh ka palonoʔ.
S.FORM: mwai' ila 'aehae' mae'iyaeh rima' mayakai' ka(no) 'ima haebaean koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ila ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh rimaʔ majakaiʔ ka(no) ʔima hæβæan koʃa pas~θkajz~ðæh ka palonoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人來跟大家說,要造一艘船.
There came a man who told the people to build a boat.

S.FORM: 'ima haebae'an mae'iyaeh toe'aewhay ka kai'.
S.PHON: ʔima hæβæʔan mæʔijæh tœʔæwhaj ka kaiʔ.
S.FORM: 'ima haebae'an mae'iyaeh toe'aewhay ka kai'.
S.PHON: ʔima hæβæʔan mæʔijæh tœʔæwhaj ka kaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 大家都不聽他的話.
The people did not listen to him.

S.FORM: rima' kalkalsiri' ka mae'iyaeh sa'sa'iin 'aehae' taew'an koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ kalkals~θiriʔ ka mæʔijæh s~θaʔs~θaʔiin ʔæhæʔ tæwʔan koʃa pas~θkajz~ðæh ka palonoʔ.
S.FORM: rima' kalkalsiri' ka mae'iyaeh sa'sa'iin 'aehae' taew'an koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ kalkals~θiriʔ ka mæʔijæh s~θaʔs~θaʔiin ʔæhæʔ tæwʔan koʃa pas~θkajz~ðæh ka palonoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他走到各家,吩咐他們要造船.
He went around and told each family to build a boat.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ʔokaj pakaiʔ s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ʔokaj pakaiʔ s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 沒有人聽他的話.
Nobody paid attention to him.

S.FORM: koSa'en So moyo kay pakai' hini nila 'oemaeh 'am hinaw ila.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ʃo mojo kaj pakaiʔ hini nila ʔœmæh ʔam hinaw ila.
S.FORM: koSa'en So moyo kay pakai' hini nila 'oemaeh 'am hinaw ila.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ʃo mojo kaj pakaiʔ hini nila ʔœmæh ʔam hinaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們若不相信,他們的地都會沈下去.
He said that if they didn't believe, their land will sink.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh 'aehae' taew'an 'ima pakai'.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ʔokaj pakaiʔ s~θaβœh ʔæhæʔ tæwʔan ʔima pakaiʔ.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh 'aehae' taew'an 'ima pakai'.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ʔokaj pakaiʔ s~θaβœh ʔæhæʔ tæwʔan ʔima pakaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 除了一個家庭之外,沒有人相信他.
Everybody did not believe him, except for one family.

S.FORM: kalahaengen noka noka koSa'en ka 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh isaa 'ima harai' ma rima' ka samiyan.
S.PHON: kalahæŋən noka noka koʃaʔən ka ʔima haraiʔ mæʔijæh is~θaa ʔima haraiʔ ma rimaʔ ka s~θamijan.
S.FORM: kalahaengen noka noka koSa'en ka 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh isaa 'ima harai' ma rima' ka samiyan.
S.PHON: kalahæŋən noka noka koʃaʔən ka ʔima haraiʔ mæʔijæh is~θaa ʔima haraiʔ ma rimaʔ ka s~θamijan.
S.TRANSL: 神會保護相信他的人.
The gods will protect those who believe.

S.FORM: o sizaeh 'ima pakai' mae'iyaeh paskayzaeh ila ka palono'.
S.PHON: o s~θiz~ðæh ʔima pakaiʔ mæʔijæh pas~θkajz~ðæh ila ka palonoʔ.
S.FORM: o sizaeh 'ima pakai' mae'iyaeh paskayzaeh ila ka palono'.
S.PHON: o s~θiz~ðæh ʔima pakaiʔ mæʔijæh pas~θkajz~ðæh ila ka palonoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有一家人聽完那人的話,就相信他,開始造船.
After the dirty person, who is a god, convinced the family, they believed and started to build a boat.

S.FORM: paskayzaeh hini mwahil yo sobaoeh.
S.PHON: pas~θkajz~ðæh hini mwahil jo s~θoβaœh.
S.FORM: paskayzaeh hini mwahil yo sobaoeh.
S.PHON: pas~θkajz~ðæh hini mwahil jo s~θoβaœh.
S.TRANSL: 船寬又大.
The boat was wide and big.

S.FORM: hoenaehngewa 'atomal 'am paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: hœnæhŋəwa ʔatomal ʔam pas~θkajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: hoenaehngewa 'atomal 'am paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: hœnæhŋəwa ʔatomal ʔam pas~θkajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 造船需要很長的時間.
It took a long time to build the boat.

S.FORM: kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh ila pas~θkajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh ila pas~θkajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 船做完以後,
Finally, the boat was completed.

S.FORM: samiyan mwai' ila kita'.
S.PHON: s~θamijan mwaiʔ ila kitaʔ.
S.FORM: samiyan mwai' ila kita'.
S.PHON: s~θamijan mwaiʔ ila kitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 神就來看看.
And the god came to see it.

S.FORM: koSa kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh niSo' ka palono.
S.PHON: koʃa kajz~ðæh ila pas~θkajz~ðæh niʃoʔ ka palono.
S.FORM: koSa kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh niSo' ka palono.
S.PHON: koʃa kajz~ðæh ila pas~θkajz~ðæh niʃoʔ ka palono.
S.TRANSL: 他說,你們的船造好了.
And said, your boat has been finished.

S.FORM: o So kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: o ʃo kajz~ðæh ila.
S.FORM: o So kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: o ʃo kajz~ðæh ila.
S.TRANSL: 如果做好了,
If it has been finished,

S.FORM: So noka hiza samiyan ka 'ima harai' sin'olan si'leb kasinpanan.
S.PHON: ʃo noka hiz~ða s~θamijan ka ʔima haraiʔ s~θinʔolan s~θiʔləβ kas~θinpanan.
S.FORM: So noka hiza samiyan ka 'ima harai' sin'olan si'leb kasinpanan.
S.PHON: ʃo noka hiz~ða s~θamijan ka ʔima haraiʔ s~θinʔolan s~θiʔləβ kas~θinpanan.
S.TRANSL: 外表骯髒的神就把所有的動物叫進船裡.

TRANSL.notes: The god, the man with dirty appearance, (called and) kept the animals inside.

S.TRANSL: The god, the man with dirty appearance, kept the animals inside.

S.FORM: sinpanan mwai' ila saboeh.
S.PHON: s~θinpanan mwaiʔ ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: sinpanan mwai' ila saboeh.
S.PHON: s~θinpanan mwaiʔ ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 所有的動物都來了.
All the animals came.

S.FORM: palono' kayzaeh ila nisia.
S.PHON: palonoʔ kajz~ðæh ila nis~θia.
S.FORM: palono' kayzaeh ila nisia.
S.PHON: palonoʔ kajz~ðæh ila nis~θia.
S.TRANSL: 他的船造好了.
His boat was finished.

S.FORM: 'a'apolon ila.
S.PHON: ʔaʔapolon ila.
S.FORM: 'a'apolon ila.
S.PHON: ʔaʔapolon ila.
S.TRANSL: 分配了位子給他們.
They were assigned spaces.

S.FORM: ka si'oe'oe ila kasinpanan si'leb ila ray 'aehae' kas kaa'leban.
S.PHON: ka s~θiʔœʔœ ila kas~θinpanan s~θiʔləβ ila raj ʔæhæʔ kas~θ kaaʔləβan.
S.FORM: ka si'oe'oe ila kasinpanan si'leb ila ray 'aehae' kas kaa'leban.
S.PHON: ka s~θiʔœʔœ ila kas~θinpanan s~θiʔləβ ila raj ʔæhæʔ kas~θ kaaʔləβan.
S.TRANSL: 所有的動物叫去關在房間裡面.
They were called and kept in a room.

S.FORM: ka pazay ma' nonak ralom ma' nonak 'ahoe' ma' nonak mae'iyaeh ma' nonak.
S.PHON: ka paz~ðaj maʔ nonak ralom maʔ nonak ʔahœʔ maʔ nonak mæʔijæh maʔ nonak.
S.FORM: ka pazay ma' nonak ralom ma' nonak 'ahoe' ma' nonak mae'iyaeh ma' nonak.
S.PHON: ka paz~ðaj maʔ nonak ralom maʔ nonak ʔahœʔ maʔ nonak mæʔijæh maʔ nonak.
S.TRANSL: 有地方放米,有地方放水,有地方放狗,每個人都有各自的地方.
There was room for putting the rice and water, as well as for the animals and the family members.

S.FORM: pak'isaza pakas'aboeen ka sinpanan maybiil ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: pakʔis~θaz~ða pakas~θʔaβœən ka s~θinpanan majβiil ila ka mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: pak'isaza pakas'aboeen ka sinpanan maybiil ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: pakʔis~θaz~ða pakas~θʔaβœən ka s~θinpanan majβiil ila ka mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: 動物先帶進船內;人最後進去.
The animals were brought first into the boat. The people entered last.

S.FORM: kas'aboe' rima' ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: kas~θʔaβœʔ rimaʔ ila hao ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: kas'aboe' rima' ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: kas~θʔaβœʔ rimaʔ ila hao ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們進去裡面.
They entered inside.

S.FORM: rima' sik noka hiza 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh noka samiyan koSa'en.
S.PHON: rimaʔ s~θik noka hiz~ða ʔima haraiʔ mæʔijæh noka s~θamijan koʃaʔən.
S.FORM: rima' sik noka hiza 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh noka samiyan koSa'en.
S.PHON: rimaʔ s~θik noka hiz~ða ʔima haraiʔ mæʔijæh noka s~θamijan koʃaʔən.
S.TRANSL: 骯髒的人告訴他們說,
The dirty man said to them,

S.FORM: so rini' aboe' soks tasok soksok takahini takahini soksok.
S.PHON: s~θo riniʔ aβœʔ s~θoks~θ tas~θok s~θoks~θok takahini takahini s~θoks~θok.
S.FORM: so rini' aboe' soks tasok soksok takahini takahini soksok.
S.PHON: s~θo riniʔ aβœʔ s~θoks~θ tas~θok s~θoks~θok takahini takahini s~θoks~θok.
S.TRANSL: 裡面要這樣鎖住.
Close it like this inside.

S.FORM: yako latar tasoksok iso'on 'inimon ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: jako latar tas~θoks~θok is~θoʔon ʔinimon ila hao ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: yako latar tasoksok iso'on 'inimon ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: jako latar tas~θoks~θok is~θoʔon ʔinimon ila hao ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我要從外面把門反鎖;你們都在裡面.
I will lock you inside from outside; you will be inside.

S.FORM: o So mwai' ka mae'iyaeh koSa haewaeh 'izi' ila i haewaeh.
S.PHON: o ʃo mwaiʔ ka mæʔijæh koʃa hæwæh ʔiz~ðiʔ ila i hæwæh.
S.FORM: o So mwai' ka mae'iyaeh koSa haewaeh 'izi' ila i haewaeh.
S.PHON: o ʃo mwaiʔ ka mæʔijæh koʃa hæwæh ʔiz~ðiʔ ila i hæwæh.
S.TRANSL: 若有人來,不要打開門.
If somebody comes, do not open it.

S.FORM: o 'izi' 'atomal 'izi' haewaeh.
S.PHON: o ʔiz~ðiʔ ʔatomal ʔiz~ðiʔ hæwæh.
S.FORM: o 'izi' 'atomal 'izi' haewaeh.
S.PHON: o ʔiz~ðiʔ ʔatomal ʔiz~ðiʔ hæwæh.
S.TRANSL: 不要打開門.
Don't open it.

S.FORM: ah inaray isaza soksokon aboe' soksokon latar.
S.PHON: ah inaraj is~θaz~ða s~θoks~θokon aβœʔ s~θoks~θokon latar.
S.FORM: ah inaray isaza soksokon aboe' soksokon latar.
S.PHON: ah inaraj is~θaz~ða s~θoks~θokon aβœʔ s~θoks~θokon latar.
S.TRANSL: 船的裡面和外面都鎖住.
The boat was locked from inside and outside.

S.FORM: honahai' mwai' ila ka 'a'oeral.
S.PHON: honahaiʔ mwaiʔ ila ka ʔaʔœral.
S.FORM: honahai' mwai' ila ka 'a'oeral.
S.PHON: honahaiʔ mwaiʔ ila ka ʔaʔœral.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後就下雨了.
It rained not long after that.

S.FORM: 'oeral ila sobaoeh ila ka 'a'oeral mwai' a ka ka 'a'oeral ni ka ka ka 'a'oeral sobaeoeh sobaeoeh ila naw.
S.PHON: ʔœral ila s~θoβaœh ila ka ʔaʔœral mwaiʔ a ka ka ʔaʔœral ni ka ka ka ʔaʔœral s~θoβæœh s~θoβæœh ila naw.
S.FORM: 'oeral ila sobaoeh ila ka 'a'oeral mwai' a ka ka 'a'oeral ni ka ka ka 'a'oeral sobaeoeh sobaeoeh ila naw.
S.PHON: ʔœral ila s~θoβaœh ila ka ʔaʔœral mwaiʔ a ka ka ʔaʔœral ni ka ka ka ʔaʔœral s~θoβæœh s~θoβæœh ila naw.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後就下雨,雨越下越大.
It rained not long after that, and the rain got bigger.

S.FORM: hani ka ray 'asang ka mae'iyaeh mwai' ila 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hani ka raj ʔas~θaŋ ka mæʔijæh mwaiʔ ila ʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: hani ka ray 'asang ka mae'iyaeh mwai' ila 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hani ka raj ʔas~θaŋ ka mæʔijæh mwaiʔ ila ʔœʔœ.
S.TRANSL: 村裡的鄰居都來了,他們呼喊著.
Neighbors in the village came and called.

S.FORM: koSa haewaeh 'iniya'om ka palono' pakas'aboe' 'iniya'om.
S.PHON: koʃa hæwæh ʔinijaʔom ka palonoʔ pakas~θʔaβœʔ ʔinijaʔom.
S.FORM: koSa haewaeh 'iniya'om ka palono' pakas'aboe' 'iniya'om.
S.PHON: koʃa hæwæh ʔinijaʔom ka palonoʔ pakas~θʔaβœʔ ʔinijaʔom.
S.TRANSL: 打開船;讓我們進去.
Open your boat; let us get in.

S.FORM: o hao 'izo' 'oe'oe koSa.
S.PHON: o hao ʔiz~ðoʔ ʔœʔœ koʃa.
S.FORM: o hao 'izo' 'oe'oe koSa.
S.PHON: o hao ʔiz~ðoʔ ʔœʔœ koʃa.
S.TRANSL: 裡面的人叫著.
Those inside called out.

S.FORM: sihaewaeh.
S.PHON: s~θihæwæh.
S.FORM: sihaewaeh.
S.PHON: s~θihæwæh.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒辦法打開門.
There's no way we can open it.

S.FORM: mayso poa'aw ila.
S.PHON: majs~θo poaʔaw ila.
S.FORM: mayso poa'aw ila.
S.PHON: majs~θo poaʔaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 沒辦法打開.
There's no way.

S.FORM: o hini rayno' ila haewaeh aboe'.
S.PHON: o hini rajnoʔ ila hæwæh aβœʔ.
S.FORM: o hini rayno' ila haewaeh aboe'.
S.PHON: o hini rajnoʔ ila hæwæh aβœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 哪裡有門可以打開?
Where is a door that can be opened?

S.FORM: ki latar soksok ila.
S.PHON: ki latar s~θoks~θok ila.
S.FORM: ki latar soksok ila.
S.PHON: ki latar s~θoks~θok ila.
S.TRANSL: 船的裡面和外面都被鎖住了.
Both inside and outside were locked.

S.FORM: o 'akoy nanaw ka ralom ki a'oeral.
S.PHON: o ʔakoj nanaw ka ralom ki aʔœral.
S.FORM: o 'akoy nanaw ka ralom ki a'oeral.
S.PHON: o ʔakoj nanaw ka ralom ki aʔœral.
S.TRANSL: 一直下雨.
It kept on raining.

S.FORM: hani ka mae'iyaeh latar 'aroelon ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hani ka mæʔijæh latar ʔarœlon ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: hani ka mae'iyaeh latar 'aroelon ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hani ka mæʔijæh latar ʔarœlon ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 外面的人都被外面的人都被沖走了.
The people outside were all flooded away.

S.FORM: nasia ka palono' toliyab ila ray ralom babaw isa lasia 'aroe'aroelon ila 'aroelon 'aroe'aroelon rima'.
S.PHON: nas~θia ka palonoʔ tolijaβ ila raj ralom βaβaw is~θa las~θia ʔarœʔarœlon ila ʔarœlon ʔarœʔarœlon rimaʔ.
S.FORM: nasia ka palono' toliyab ila ray ralom babaw isa lasia 'aroe'aroelon ila 'aroelon 'aroe'aroelon rima'.
S.PHON: nas~θia ka palonoʔ tolijaβ ila raj ralom βaβaw is~θa las~θia ʔarœʔarœlon ila ʔarœlon ʔarœʔarœlon rimaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 船就漂浮在水中.
The boat floated on the water.

S.FORM: lasia pakai' ila koSa sa'oewaz hini ka 'oemaeh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.PHON: las~θia pakaiʔ ila koʃa s~θaʔœwaz~ð hini ka ʔœmæh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.FORM: lasia pakai' ila koSa sa'oewaz hini ka 'oemaeh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.PHON: las~θia pakaiʔ ila koʃa s~θaʔœwaz~ð hini ka ʔœmæh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們就相信那個人講的話是真的.
They believed what the man had said were true.

S.FORM: 'ita' hini' 'izo' ray palono' kakoway ila hini.
S.PHON: ʔitaʔ hiniʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ raj palonoʔ kakowaj ila hini.
S.FORM: 'ita' hini' 'izo' ray palono' kakoway ila hini.
S.PHON: ʔitaʔ hiniʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ raj palonoʔ kakowaj ila hini.
S.TRANSL: 船的裡面在搖晃.
We inside the boat were rocking.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila i kita'i hani mita' saeng kakoway ila.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila i kitaʔi hani mitaʔ s~θæŋ kakowaj ila.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila i kita'i hani mita' saeng kakoway ila.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila i kitaʔi hani mitaʔ s~θæŋ kakowaj ila.
S.TRANSL: 船一搖晃,我們就坐下來.
We sat down as the boat started to move.

S.FORM: ka sia hiza ka palono' kik raami hoenaehnge ila nanaw mastalay ila ray 'oka' ila i kakoway o.
S.PHON: ka s~θia hiz~ða ka palonoʔ kik raami hœnæhŋə ila nanaw mas~θtalaj ila raj ʔokaʔ ila i kakowaj o.
S.FORM: ka sia hiza ka palono' kik raami hoenaehnge ila nanaw mastalay ila ray 'oka' ila i kakoway o.
S.PHON: ka s~θia hiz~ða ka palonoʔ kik raami hœnæhŋə ila nanaw mas~θtalaj ila raj ʔokaʔ ila i kakowaj o.
S.TRANSL: 我們不知道發生什麼事了.船卡住了,不再動.
The boat, we did not know what happened. It got stuck. It's not moving anymore.

S.FORM: o honahai' ila nanaw honahai' ila nanaw.
S.PHON: o honahaiʔ ila nanaw honahaiʔ ila nanaw.
S.FORM: o honahai' ila nanaw honahai' ila nanaw.
S.PHON: o honahaiʔ ila nanaw honahaiʔ ila nanaw.
S.TRANSL: 過了不久,
After a while

S.FORM: ka lasia ma' 'okay haewaeh ka.
S.PHON: ka las~θia maʔ ʔokaj hæwæh ka.
S.FORM: ka lasia ma' 'okay haewaeh ka.
S.PHON: ka las~θia maʔ ʔokaj hæwæh ka.
S.TRANSL: 他們沒有打開.
They did not open.

S.FORM: sahoeroe ka katesnenan.
S.PHON: s~θahœrœ ka katəs~θnənan.
S.FORM: sahoeroe ka katesnenan.
S.PHON: s~θahœrœ ka katəs~θnənan.
S.TRANSL: 他們找不到出口.

TRANSL.notes: (since) they could not find a way out.

S.TRANSL: they could not find a way out.

S.FORM: taz 'ima ila kayzaeh ila nanaw 'oka' ila o naehaen ila kik kakoway hawaeh ila katesnenan.
S.PHON: taz~ð ʔima ila kajz~ðæh ila nanaw ʔokaʔ ila o næhæn ila kik kakowaj hawæh ila katəs~θnənan.
S.FORM: taz 'ima ila kayzaeh ila nanaw 'oka' ila o naehaen ila kik kakoway hawaeh ila katesnenan.
S.PHON: taz~ð ʔima ila kajz~ðæh ila nanaw ʔokaʔ ila o næhæn ila kik kakowaj hawæh ila katəs~θnənan.
S.TRANSL: 一切都平靜下來,船不再搖晃.他們就打開門.

TRANSL.notes: Everything stabled. The boat was not rocking anymore. (They) opened the door.

S.TRANSL: Everything stabled. The boat was not rocking anymore. opened the door.

S.FORM: rima' hawaeh Sa kita'en sa hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.PHON: rimaʔ hawæh ʃa kitaʔən s~θa hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.FORM: rima' hawaeh Sa kita'en sa hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.PHON: rimaʔ hawæh ʃa kitaʔən s~θa hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們就打開門.他們看到山都不一樣.

TRANSL.notes: They opened (the door), and saw the mountains were not the same.

S.TRANSL: They opened , and saw the mountains were not the same.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hoerok 'oka' ila ka kaehoey 'oka' ila ka hinbetel.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ka hœrok ʔokaʔ ila ka kæhœj ʔokaʔ ila ka hinβətəl.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hoerok 'oka' ila ka kaehoey 'oka' ila ka hinbetel.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ka hœrok ʔokaʔ ila ka kæhœj ʔokaʔ ila ka hinβətəl.
S.TRANSL: 平地不再有;樹木不再有;草地不再有.
The flatland was not there. The trees were not there. The grassland was not there.

S.FORM: m kwakwasan ila.
S.PHON: m kwakwas~θan ila.
S.FORM: m kwakwasan ila.
S.PHON: m kwakwas~θan ila.
S.TRANSL: 有發生山崩.
There had been a landslide.

S.FORM: lasia koSa 'am kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: las~θia koʃa ʔam kajz~ðæh ila.
S.FORM: lasia koSa 'am kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: las~θia koʃa ʔam kajz~ðæh ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們說一切都會很好.
They said everything would be all right.

S.FORM: kaka noka ka kas kakasrayan ka.
S.PHON: kaka noka ka kas~θ kakas~θrajan ka.
S.FORM: kaka noka ka kas kakasrayan ka.
S.PHON: kaka noka ka kas~θ kakas~θrajan ka.
S.TRANSL: 要如何下去呢?
How do we get down?

S.FORM: o sia 'am rima' ila matawaw.
S.PHON: o s~θia ʔam rimaʔ ila matawaw.
S.FORM: o sia 'am rima' ila matawaw.
S.PHON: o s~θia ʔam rimaʔ ila matawaw.
S.TRANSL: 他就開始工作.
He went to work.

S.FORM: kiim ila ka pazay.
S.PHON: kiim ila ka paz~ðaj.
S.FORM: kiim ila ka pazay.
S.PHON: kiim ila ka paz~ðaj.
S.TRANSL: 他就去找米.
He went to look for rice.

S.FORM: hawaeh hawaeh kasinpanan.
S.PHON: hawæh hawæh kas~θinpanan.
S.FORM: hawaeh hawaeh kasinpanan.
S.PHON: hawæh hawæh kas~θinpanan.
S.TRANSL: 他放所有的動物自由.
He set the animals free.

S.FORM: koSa 'am mari' ila ka pazay tatokoeh ray 'oem'oemah.
S.PHON: koʃa ʔam mariʔ ila ka paz~ðaj tatokœh raj ʔœmʔœmah.
S.FORM: koSa 'am mari' ila ka pazay tatokoeh ray 'oem'oemah.
S.PHON: koʃa ʔam mariʔ ila ka paz~ðaj tatokœh raj ʔœmʔœmah.
S.TRANSL: 他們拿了米去種在土地上.
They took rice to plant on the land.

S.FORM: hawaeh soksok 'es'es atomalan.
S.PHON: hawæh s~θoks~θok ʔəs~θʔəs~θ atomalan.
S.FORM: hawaeh soksok 'es'es atomalan.
S.PHON: hawæh s~θoks~θok ʔəs~θʔəs~θ atomalan.
S.TRANSL: 門緊緊地被鎖住.
The door was shut tight.

S.FORM: lasia mangowip ila ka paalowa'an mita' koSa ka noka samiyan koSa o hini ka 'am nak hini a hawaeh ka binsi'.
S.PHON: las~θia maŋowip ila ka paalowaʔan mitaʔ koʃa ka noka s~θamijan koʃa o hini ka ʔam nak hini a hawæh ka βins~θiʔ.
S.FORM: lasia mangowip ila ka paalowa'an mita' koSa ka noka samiyan koSa o hini ka 'am nak hini a hawaeh ka binsi'.
S.PHON: las~θia maŋowip ila ka paalowaʔan mitaʔ koʃa ka noka s~θamijan koʃa o hini ka ʔam nak hini a hawæh ka βins~θiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們已經忘記神的吩咐怎麼打開門.
The have forgotten how to open it as the gods have instructed them.

S.FORM: lasia mari' ka binsi' tasi' noka 'aewhaes ila lasia kaas ila hao latar lobih mwai' liboe' naehaen ri'sason ray huk ay palono' 'izo'.
S.PHON: las~θia mariʔ ka βins~θiʔ tas~θiʔ noka ʔæwhæs~θ ila las~θia kaas~θ ila hao latar loβih mwaiʔ liβœʔ næhæn riʔs~θas~θon raj h*k aj palonoʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: lasia mari' ka binsi' tasi' noka 'aewhaes ila lasia kaas ila hao latar lobih mwai' liboe' naehaen ri'sason ray huk ay palono' 'izo'.
S.PHON: las~θia mariʔ ka βins~θiʔ tas~θiʔ noka ʔæwhæs~θ ila las~θia kaas~θ ila hao latar loβih mwaiʔ liβœʔ næhæn riʔs~θas~θon raj h*k aj palonoʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 被放自由的老鼠回到船上,把牠們的窩擺在裡面.
The mice set free returned to the boat and built their nest there.

S.FORM: hinbetel pahaengal lasia sekela Sa hini kayzaeh ila ka.
S.PHON: hinβətəl pahæŋal las~θia s~θəkəla ʃa hini kajz~ðæh ila ka.
S.FORM: hinbetel pahaengal lasia sekela Sa hini kayzaeh ila ka.
S.PHON: hinβətəl pahæŋal las~θia s~θəkəla ʃa hini kajz~ðæh ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠看到 .

TRANSL.notes: The mice saw (the inside of the boat).

S.TRANSL: The mice saw .

S.FORM: kakasrayan noka mae'iyaeh katokohan.
S.PHON: kakas~θrajan noka mæʔijæh katokohan.
S.FORM: kakasrayan noka mae'iyaeh katokohan.
S.PHON: kakas~θrajan noka mæʔijæh katokohan.
S.TRANSL: 草地上是他們可以下去的地方,在那裡種植.
The grassland is where they could get down and stay to do planting.

S.FORM: ka aewhaes si'ael ka 'i'ih ka balihaeh sanhowangen rima' si'ael ka pazay ki binsi'.
S.PHON: ka æwhæs~θ s~θiʔæl ka ʔiʔih ka βalihæh s~θanhowaŋən rimaʔ s~θiʔæl ka paz~ðaj ki βins~θiʔ.
S.FORM: ka aewhaes si'ael ka 'i'ih ka balihaeh sanhowangen rima' si'ael ka pazay ki binsi'.
S.PHON: ka æwhæs~θ s~θiʔæl ka ʔiʔih ka βalihæh s~θanhowaŋən rimaʔ s~θiʔæl ka paz~ðaj ki βins~θiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠在木頭上啃了一個洞,吃掉米和種子.
The mice gnawed a hole on the wood and ate the rice and seed.

S.FORM: 'am raiw ila nisia roSa' ka kinseman phangal noka sapang mae'iyaeh parayliz.
S.PHON: ʔam raiw ila nis~θia roʃaʔ ka kins~θəman phaŋal noka s~θapaŋ mæʔijæh parajliz~ð.
S.FORM: 'am raiw ila nisia roSa' ka kinseman phangal noka sapang mae'iyaeh parayliz.
S.PHON: ʔam raiw ila nis~θia roʃaʔ ka kins~θəman phaŋal noka s~θapaŋ mæʔijæh parajliz~ð.
S.TRANSL: 他們正要離去的時候,掛著的兩袋米被抓走了.
When they were about to leave, the two bundles of rice hanging were grabbed away.

S.FORM: ta koSa mari'in lasia parayliz mari'in sitokoh tokoh kita'en 'aehae' ho'ol 'aehae' bolasih 'in'alay zi'saza sia.
S.PHON: ta koʃa mariʔin las~θia parajliz~ð mariʔin s~θitokoh tokoh kitaʔən ʔæhæʔ hoʔol ʔæhæʔ βolas~θih ʔinʔalaj z~ðiʔs~θaz~ða s~θia.
S.FORM: ta koSa mari'in lasia parayliz mari'in sitokoh tokoh kita'en 'aehae' ho'ol 'aehae' bolasih 'in'alay zi'saza sia.
S.PHON: ta koʃa mariʔin las~θia parajliz~ð mariʔin s~θitokoh tokoh kitaʔən ʔæhæʔ hoʔol ʔæhæʔ βolas~θih ʔinʔalaj z~ðiʔs~θaz~ða s~θia.
S.TRANSL: 被他們搶回來的稻種, 拿去播種之後, 發現有兩種, 一種是糯米, 一種是在來米.
They planted those millets that they took back. When those millets grew up, they found that there are two kinds: one is glutinous rice and the other Zai-lai rice.

S.FORM: ka maysosowaw haebaeaen ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: ka majs~θos~θowaw hæβææn ila ka mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: ka maysosowaw haebaeaen ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: ka majs~θos~θowaw hæβææn ila ka mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: 漸漸變很多人.
More and more people there were.

S.FORM: o haebaeaen ila ka 'asang.
S.PHON: o hæβææn ila ka ʔas~θaŋ.
S.FORM: o haebaeaen ila ka 'asang.
S.PHON: o hæβææn ila ka ʔas~θaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 村莊也很多.
More and more tribes there were.

S.FORM: hayza ila ka hapoy.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ila ka hapoj.
S.FORM: hayza ila ka hapoy.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ila ka hapoj.
S.TRANSL: 火也有了.
There was fire.

S.FORM: hayza' ila ka raan.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ila ka raan.
S.FORM: hayza' ila ka raan.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ila ka raan.
S.TRANSL: 道路也有了.
There are roads.
